questions.question: Define Big Data Analytics and explain its significance in today's business world. (10 marks)
questions.hint: It provides insights into patterns, trends, and correlations in large datasets to make informed decisions.

questions.question: Classify the different types of analytics used in Big Data. (8 marks)
What is the primary advantage of using Big Data Analytics in a retail organization? (12 marks)
questions.hint: It enables the organization to gain valuable insights into customer behavior, preferences, and shopping patterns to improve marketing strategies and increase sales.
